= Trophy Balls =
{{IconExampleHeader}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Sim Champion|orange}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Sim 2nd Place|purple}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Sim 3rd Place|blue}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|The Champion|orange}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|2nd Place Winner|purple}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|3rd Place Winner|blue}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Dung Beetles Champion|orange}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Dung Beetles 2nd Place|purple}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Dung Beetles 3rd Place|blue}}
|}

[[Category:Icons]]
